name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Here's how to use CodeBuddy:

• Tap 💡 Examples to see what you can ask
• Just type a Python question — I'll answer with code and explanations
• I remember our recent conversation for follow-ups

Keep your questions focused on Python and I'll do my best to help!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
